subject: fix(pwa): address 7 gaps found in canva-grid comparison audit
body:
Manifest hardening:
- Add id: '/' for stable PWA identity (Chrome derives from start_url without it)
- Add scope: '/' and start_url: '/' explicitly
- Add prefer_related_applications: false (Chrome may skip beforeinstallprompt without it)

Workbox cleanup:
- Remove dead Google Fonts runtime cache rule (graphiki uses system fonts)
- Simplify globPatterns (remove ico/svg — no ICO files, SVG favicon removed)

Install improvements:
- Add appinstalled event listener to usePWAInstall — clears install banner
  immediately when user installs via any path (browser menu, not just our prompt)
- Add PWA benefits section to InstallInstructionsModal — "Works offline",
  "Launches from home screen/dock", "Full-screen experience"

Icon generation:
- Add dedicated apple-touch-icon.png at 180x180 (Apple recommended size)
- Update index.html to reference apple-touch-icon instead of reusing pwa-192

Tags: pwa, manifest, workbox, install, icons, audit
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: minor
